criteria.description: Read/background commands (emit, sync status/pull/push/run, tracker status/map list, daemon tick) leave git status --porcelain + config.yaml byte-identical
criteria.evidence: tests/specify_cli/sync/test_worktree_clean_invariant.py::test_covered_command_leaves_worktree_clean — 19 passed (parallel + -n0 serial); independent reviewer sabotage proved non-fakeable
criteria.notes: Verified by approved WP tests (mypy --strict + ruff clean; reviewer-renata independent re-run).

criteria.description: Identity resolved on read/emit paths without persisting; stable across invocations
criteria.notes: Verified by approved WP tests (mypy --strict + ruff clean; reviewer-renata independent re-run).

criteria.description: Identity/binding persistence only at write-authorized boundaries (init, tracker bind)
criteria.evidence: grep ensure_identity → only init.py + cli/commands/tracker.py:680 bind; test_accept_readiness_no_write.py::test_write_authorized_ensure_identity_still_persists
criteria.notes: Verified by approved WP tests (mypy --strict + ruff clean; reviewer-renata independent re-run).

criteria.description: Tracker binding_ref report-only on read paths; persists only on explicit bind/apply
criteria.evidence: tests/specify_cli/tracker/test_binding_report_only.py (12 passed) + retargeted test_tracker_discovery_integration; pytest -k tracker 609 passed/0 failed
criteria.notes: Verified by approved WP tests (mypy --strict + ruff clean; reviewer-renata independent re-run).

criteria.description: Automated regression test enforces INV-1 across the covered surface
criteria.notes: Verified by approved WP tests (mypy --strict + ruff clean; reviewer-renata independent re-run).

criteria.description: Test parametrized over the surface; new covered command must satisfy INV-1 or fail
criteria.notes: Verified by approved WP tests (mypy --strict + ruff clean; reviewer-renata independent re-run).

criteria.description: record-analysis still refuses genuine uncommitted changes (DIRTY_WORKTREE)
criteria.notes: Verified by approved WP tests (mypy --strict + ruff clean; reviewer-renata independent re-run).

criteria.description: Read/background commands side-effect-free when SaaS sync disabled/unauthenticated
